text: UAE CBUAE Law deadline for firms to regularise position is under 90 days away
DFSA updates crypto token regulatory framework effective January 2026 with stablecoin treatment
UAE Securities and Commodities Authority reconstituted as Capital Market Authority from January 2026
du telecom launches US$50 million du Ventures fund targeting fintech AI and cybersecurity
SAMA introduces updated supervisory framework replacing April 2021 payment systems oversight rules
Systemically important payment operators in KSA must now conduct mandatory self-assessments under SAMA
Saudi Arabia targets 525 fintech companies by 2030 under Financial Sector Development Program
UAE open finance and virtual asset payment services now expressly regulated under CBUAE Law
GCC AML and CFT regulatory enforcement activity intensifying across payments and fintech sector
SAMA framework incorporates 2025 public consultation feedback to balance innovation and consumer protection
